title: Šabac, Mačva — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Šabac, Mačva: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Šabac is a city in Mačva with a population of 54,000. A city in western Serbia on the Sava River, known for its riverside promenade, the Šabac Fortress, and its agricultural and food processing industries.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
